notes: Simplifies Pathmark theming so Streamlit fully owns Light, Dark and System appearance.
Keeps seasonal themes as accent-only choices: Summer, Autumn, Winter and Spring.
Removes Pathmark JavaScript appearance watching and legacy light/dark override styling.
Stops overriding Streamlit page backgrounds, core text, inputs, popovers and settings menu styling.
Keeps Pathmark custom cards and buttons styled with seasonal accent variables only.
release_notes: Simplifies the theme system: Streamlit controls appearance, while Pathmark seasonal themes only set accents and custom component styling.
label: Streamlit-native seasonal accent themes
